race.comment: SEVEN OCEANS (7) is a filly who's always had a bit of a rap on her and she's gone close in this grade before. Probably found the class a bit too rich last time out but has had a break since and the jumpouts have hinted she'll be ready to go first-up. DOC'S NIPPER (3) stuck on well last start to finish second over 1000m at Pakenham when camped just off the speed but he finds a more suitable race this time. Shouldn't be lacking for fitness now third-up from a spell. MOSQUITO AWARD (5) is a sister to Swats That who had a brief but fruitful debut prep and has trialled like she'll pick up where she left off. TESORO MIO (4) has been kept fresh since winning over 900m at Corowa but was kept up to the mark with a recent Bendigo trial placing.
